title: Museum Gift Shop Receipt
text:
## Museum Gift Shop Receipt

Thank you for visiting the {adjective} Museum of {plural noun}.

Your purchase includes one {color} {object}, {number} postcards, and a plush {animal} labeled historically accurate.

Cashier: {person}

Discount reason: customer correctly identified the ancient {body part}.

Please do not {verb} the replica {noun} inside the cafe.

If your souvenir begins {verb ending in -ing}, return to the {place} desk and ask for a {emotion} {job} wearing a {clothing item}, then {verb} {adverb} toward the {place}.
